items.name: Guluduck
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: normal.
items.description_schinese: 换上黑白礼服的嘴硬奶鸭，口头禅"嘎？这合理吗？"

items.name: Emberfox
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire.
items.description_schinese: 急性子的高个子奶狐，火焰尾巴比头还高，随情绪忽大忽小

items.name: Voltmouse
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric.
items.description_schinese: 巴掌大的迷你雷鼠，兴奋时会把静电传给别人

items.name: Bubblefrog
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: water.
items.description_schinese: 飘在半空的圆滚小鲸，慢性子乐天派，喷水柱里装着今天的心情

items.name: Sproutcap
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass.
items.description_schinese: 顶着比身体大三倍的菌帽，晒到太阳会不自觉左右摇摆

items.name: Frostpeng
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: ice.
items.description_schinese: 毛茸茸的壮实小雪怪，高冷话少，其实最怕别人不理它

items.name: Thunderking
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric.
items.description_schinese: 头戴静电王冠的胖鼠皇，打个哈欠都带雷声

items.name: Plasmatanuki
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, electric.
items.description_schinese: 圆耳朵的狐狸，火焰尾里裹着一道噼啪电芯

items.name: Vinevolt
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass.
items.description_schinese: 闪电尾上缠着发光藤蔓的小鼠，晒太阳就是充电

items.name: Auroramink
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, ice.
items.description_schinese: 皮毛流动着极光色彩的蓬毛小貂

items.name: Sparkduck
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, normal.
items.description_schinese: 羽毛噼啪带电的白鸭，摸头会被轻微电到

items.name: Stormeel
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, water.
items.description_schinese: 头顶自带一朵小雷雨云的发光电鲸

items.name: Infernofox
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire.
items.description_schinese: 三条火焰尾的大狐狸，走过之处留下小小焦印

items.name: Cinderleaf
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass.
items.description_schinese: 帽檐永远燃着一线火星的蘑菇，自带炭火气

items.name: Thermowolf
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, ice.
items.description_schinese: 半身火纹半身冰纹的毛怪，冷热同体

items.name: Blazeduck
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, normal.
items.description_schinese: 呆毛烧成三簇小火苗的白鸭，尾巴是一撮狐火

items.name: Steamander
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: water, fire.
items.description_schinese: 喷汽不喷水的温泉鲸，尾鳍尖上燃着小火

items.name: Mycobeast
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass.
items.description_schinese: 帽子上长着一整片小蘑菇林的温顺巨菇

items.name: Frostbunny
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, ice.
items.description_schinese: 帽顶竖着两只雪绒"兔耳"的冻蘑菇，会织围巾

items.name: Mossduck
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, normal.
items.description_schinese: 头顶小菇帽、背上长苔藓的悠闲鸭

items.name: Lotusturtle
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: water, grass.
items.description_schinese: 头顶莲叶帽、喷水口里长出嫩芽的池塘园丁

items.name: Glacierpeng
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: ice.
items.description_schinese: 披冰晶披风的雪怪皇帝，呼吸凝成雪花

items.name: Frostduck
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 围着蓬蓬霜毛围脖的酷鸭，羽毛结着细霜

items.name: Floeseal
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 坐在随身小浮冰上的圆雪怪，尾巴是一片尾鳍

items.name: Guluswan
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: normal.
items.description_schinese: 黑白礼服的优雅天鹅，激动时仍会"嘎"地破音

items.name: Rippleduck
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: water, normal.
items.description_schinese: 尾巴变成小尾鳍的水灵鸭，走路自带涟漪光环

items.name: Tidefrog
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: water.
items.description_schinese: 背驮一朵永不落下的浪花的大鲸，游过带起水雾

items.description_schinese: 由 electric+electric 融合而来的蛋（绑定，不可交易）。

items.name: Weldbug
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire.
items.description_schinese: 圆滚小甲虫，鞘翅是两块可开合的焊接面罩，屁股喷焊花；一丝不苟的工地老师傅

items.name: Voltquill
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass.
items.description_schinese: 小刺猬，背刺是一根根蓄电叶片，受惊全体炸毛发光；胆小但好奇心旺盛

items.name: Aurowl
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, ice.
items.description_schinese: 圆滚雪鸮，眉羽是两道小极光，尾羽拖极光丝带；熬夜观星的学者

items.name: Zapbun
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, normal.
items.description_schinese: 长耳是两根天线、背插发条钥匙的小兔，蹦跳时耳尖冒电火；电量满格的话痨

items.name: Voltmare
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, water.
items.description_schinese: 直立漂浮小海马，卷尾缠着一朵小雷云，背鳍是均衡器光条；节奏感天生满分

items.name: Chilizard
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass.
items.description_schinese: 低趴小蜥蜴，尾巴是一根卷曲红辣椒，背脊一排叶鳍；嗜辣暴脾气（但很小只）

items.name: Onsenmonk
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, ice.
items.description_schinese: 泡温泉的雪猴，左颊暖橘右颊霜蓝，头顶常年蒸汽；享受主义慢性子

items.name: Waxlamb
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, normal.
items.description_schinese: 奶白蜡质卷毛羊，呆毛是一撮烛火，情绪越高火越旺；温吞治愈系

items.name: Steamalotl
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, water.
items.description_schinese: 粉白六角螈，六根外鳃是噗噗冒汽的蒸汽管；笑眯眯的按部就班派

items.name: Pinefawn
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, ice.
items.description_schinese: 细腿小鹿，角是两枝挂雪松枝，松绿短绒；安静的冬日邮差气质

items.name: Potturtle
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, normal.
items.description_schinese: 龟壳是一只陶土花盆，盆里种着嫩芽，浇水会开小花；佛系园丁

items.name: Lilyfrog
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, water.
items.description_schinese: 蹲坐小青蛙，头顶荷叶圆帽，喉囊鼓起像小荷苞；一下雨就开心

items.name: Snowcub
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 站立圆雪球小白熊，围星星围巾，肚皮是软雪；冷链快递实习生，干劲十足

items.name: Icejelly
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 伞盖是一坨旋涡冰淇淋的小水母，触手是四根奶油卷；飘来飘去的甜品师

items.name: Sudsotter
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 顺滑长身水獭，永远顶着一撮肥皂泡刘海；爱干净的社交达人

items.name: Pyrepeacock
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass.
items.description_schinese: 小孔雀，开屏即一面烟花：羽眼是火星、羽枝带电光、羽底叶纹；爱炫但业务过硬

items.name: Stormdrake
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, ice.
items.description_schinese: 面条身形的东方小龙，一角冒火一角结霜，背鬃是静电茸毛；云端气象员

items.name: Rockrooster
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, normal.
items.description_schinese: 大红摇滚公鸡，鸡冠是跳动火焰，尾羽三根闪电；嗓门大心肠软

items.name: Boilshrimp
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, water.
items.description_schinese: 卷成 C 形的小虾，背壳是麻辣锅纹，长须带电；夜市摊主嗓门王

items.name: Glowhum
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass, ice.
items.description_schinese: 拇指大的蜂鸟，翅膀振出极光残影，尾羽是冰晶叶；实验室里最快的观察员

items.name: Windmole
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass, normal.
items.description_schinese: 圆滚鼹鼠背着小风车背包，护目镜推在头顶；田园发电站站长

items.name: Glowfly
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass, water.
items.description_schinese: 尾灯是暖黄小灯泡的萤火虫，叶形翅挂着露珠；夜班图书管理员

items.name: Waddleskate
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 圆企鹅，脚蹼是两片冰刀，围脖别着号码牌；冰壶馆全能选手

items.name: Frostangler
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 圆滚深海鮟鱇，头顶钓竿挑着闪电灯泡，冰牙软糯无害；夜班巡逻员

items.name: Maildove
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 灰白信鸽挎云朵邮包，护目镜带电光；使命必达急性子

items.name: Seasonleon
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass, ice.
items.description_schinese: 变色龙，身体三段花色（焰橙/叶绿/霜蓝）随心情流动，卷尾是调色环；艺术家脾气

items.name: Toastybara
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass, normal.
items.description_schinese: 方砖体型水豚，头顶吐司帽，尾巴是麦穗；面包房定海神针，处变不惊

items.name: Bobamingo
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass, water.
items.description_schinese: 奶茶粉火烈鸟单腿站立，脖颈弯成吸管弧度，腿挂珍珠脚环；下午茶宣传大使

items.name: Lattegolem
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 两段式雪人，胸口嵌温热咖啡心，头顶奶泡贝雷帽；咖啡店店长，字面意义外冷内热

items.name: Saunapuff
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 圆滚河豚，鼓气喷蒸汽、泄气飘雪粒，刺是软桑拿木钉；呼吸自成节奏

items.name: Ramencoon
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 小浣熊顶着冒热气的拉面碗帽，尾环纹像叉烧卷；深夜食堂主厨

items.name: Yarncat
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 蜷成毛线球的猫，只露耳朵尾巴，冰蓝×叶绿双股线；织补铺看板猫，懒得可爱

items.name: Terrasnail
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 蜗牛壳是玻璃冰花房，壳里飘微型雪、养一株小绿植；移动温室管理员

items.name: Scaresprout
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 田间稻草人小神，草帽垂稻穗，袖口漏新芽；守田的老好人

items.name: Bowlrus
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 敦实小海象，獠牙是保龄球瓶纹，肚皮球道条纹；冰上保龄球馆馆长

items.name: Lanternloong
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass, ice.
items.description_schinese: 纸扎小龙灯，灯身四段各透一色元素光，竹篾骨架流苏尾；节庆巡游台柱

items.name: Discobloom
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass, normal.
items.description_schinese: 会走的向日葵，花盘是镭射唱片纹，花瓣火橙电黄相间；夜场主唱

items.name: Juicepitcher
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass, water.
items.description_schinese: 圆滚猪笼草，笼身是果汁杯、插藤蔓吸管，笼盖小草帽；果汁摊摊主

items.name: Mochipop
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 雪白年糕团子，烤到微鼓会"啵"地弹起，头插仙女棒；跨年夜限定艺人

items.name: Meteoropus
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 骑在自己云朵上的小章鱼，四触手各拎一种天气；气象台外景主播

items.name: Grillgator
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 低趴长身小鳄，背鳞是一排冒火光的烤炉格栅，尾拴灯串；夜市烧烤扛把子

items.name: Chimebell
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass, ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 倒挂风铃草精灵，花铃结冰晶铃舌，风过叮咚带电微光；禅意音疗师

items.name: Frostclione
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass, ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 半透明冰蓝海天使，小翅拍出极光涟漪，胸口一点叶绿心；安静的深海诗人

items.name: Mistyox
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 青灰小水牛，角间挂一串算珠，背上一小片自带细雨的稻云；算账最快的老会计

items.name: Subhermit
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 寄居蟹背着黄色小潜水艇当壳，潜望镜从壳顶伸出；深海快递潜航员

items.name: Teapir
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass, ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 圆滚食梦貘，长鼻是茶壶嘴，呼出的梦是茶香白雾；睡觉即本职工作的茶艺师

items.name: Brewbat
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass, ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 圆耳小蝙蝠，翅膜内衬四色药剂分层纹，总倒挂着摇瓶子；炼金夜班学徒

items.name: Porkchef
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 圆成汤圆的小猪，厨师帽永远歪着，围裙四色酱渍；农家乐大厨，尝菜比做菜多

items.name: Spadolphin
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 奶白小海豚，背鳍挂温泉旅馆门帘，额顶小毛巾；旅馆女将，鞠躬弧度完美

items.name: Snowbonsai
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: grass, ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 会走路的雪松盆景，枝上积雪终年不化，盆沿结冰棱花边；自称百岁的园艺大师

items.name: Liondance
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass, ice, normal.
items.description_schinese: 节庆舞狮，狮头五彩流苏对应五元素、额镜眨眼会响铃；揭幕仪式专业户

items.name: Manacorn
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass, ice, water.
items.description_schinese: 小独角兽，鬃毛是流动的五元素光带，独角是水晶塔罗签；占卜从不失手（因为只说好话）

items.name: Queenbuzz
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 蜂后，五瓣花冠冠冕，腹纹五色渐变环，翅膀振出音浪纹；乐团首席指挥

items.name: Gargoylite
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 胖石像鬼，石翅内衬四色元素纹，自带小石柱平台；城市天台导游

items.name: Crystalwing
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, grass, ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 蜻蜓，四片翅膀是四色雕花玻璃，尾灯一点星光；湿地自然观察员

items.name: Claypango
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: fire, grass, ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 穿山甲，鳞片是一片片上釉陶瓦、五色釉彩；古法窑厂传人，慢工出细活

items.name: Prismkirin
items.description: Gulugulu creature · elements: electric, fire, grass, ice, normal, water.
items.description_schinese: 六棱水晶角小麒麟，鬃与尾是六色流光，蹄踏云纹光环，背脊浮六枚元素徽；全谱旗舰，登场自带 BGM（自己哼的）
